title: Alljoined1
description: Alljoined1 is an EEG dataset comprising neural responses from eight healthy adults viewing 10,000 natural images presented via rapid serial visual presentation (RSVP). The dataset contains approximately 46,080 epochs recorded using a 64-channel BioSemi ActiveTwo system at 512 Hz, designed to enable EEG-to-image decoding research. Raw data are preserved in BioSemi Data Format (24-bit resolution) with accompanying preprocessed and epoched derivatives. Note: approximately 46,080 epochs represents the total after accounting for missing data (sub-03 ses-01 epoched file unavailable).
methods_description: EEG recordings were acquired using a 64-channel BioSemi ActiveTwo system with Ag/AgCl sintered electrodes positioned according to the International 10-20 system, digitized at 512 Hz with 24-bit A/D conversion. Participants performed an oddball detection task during rapid serial visual presentation of natural images (300 ms stimulus, 300 ms inter-stimulus interval with 0-50 ms jitter). Preprocessing included band-pass filtering (0.5-125 Hz), 60 Hz notch filtering, FastICA (95% variance retained), epoching (-50 to 600 ms), AutoReject artifact rejection, baseline correction, and average re-referencing.
